en: Warning of 'tsunami of chronic disease' as dialysis units ration care. Dialysis units across Australia and New Zealand are being forced to ration lifesaving care for patients with kidney failure, according to a major new report which has warned of a "significant threat" to patient safety.

title: Alaska landslide set off CN Tower-sized tsunami last year — and a warning for B.C.
description: When millions of tonnes of rock fell one kilometre into an Alaskan fiord last year, it set off one of the largest tsunamis ever recorded, a monstrous 481-metre wave higher than the tallest viewing platform of the CN Tower, a new study shows.

Als letztes Jahr Millionen Tonnen Gestein einen Kilometer in einen Fjord in Alaska fielen, löste er einen der größten jemals aufgezeichneten Tsunamis aus, eine monströse 481 Meter hohe Welle, die höher war als die höchste Aussichtsplattform des CN Tower, wie eine neue Studie zeigt.

title: Second biggest tsunami EVER recorded: Huge wave 1.5 times the size of the Eiffel Tower shook a popular tourist spot in Alaska last year, study reveals
description: Measuring 1,578ft (481 metres) high, the tsunami ran up the wall of Tracy Arm fjord on 10 August, 2025.
content:

Mit einer Höhe von 1.578 Fuß (481 Meter) raste der Tsunami am 10. August 2025 die Wand des Tracy-Arm-Fjords hinauf.

la: Secundus maximus tsunami SAECULA memoriae: Ingens unda 1.5 temporibus Eiffel turris magnitudo popularis urbis in Alaska loco superiore anno concussit, studium manifestat. Mensurans 1,578ft (481 metra) alta, tsunami ad murum Tracy Arm fjord accurrit die 10 Augusti, anno 2025^.
